name: dmat-platform
description: Digital Assessment Platform with in-house exam delivery and proctoring

scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @dmat/types build && pnpm --filter @dmat/auth build && pnpm --filter @dmat/ui build && pnpm --filter @dmat/database build
scripts.build:apps: pnpm --filter @dmat/api build && pnpm --filter @dmat/web-public build && pnpm --filter @dmat/web-candidate build && pnpm --filter @dmat/exam-player build && pnpm --filter @dmat/proctor-console build && pnpm --filter @dmat/test-center build && pnpm --filter @dmat/admin build
scripts.setup: pnpm db:generate && pnpm db:push && pnpm db:seed
